title: Kerala High Court holds election petition by Thrissur voter against Union Minister Suresh Gopi is maintainable
description: The Kerala High Court on Wednesday held that the election petition filed by a voter against election of actor and Union Minister Suresh Gopi as a Member of Parliament (MP) from the Thrissur Lok Sabha constituency in 2024 is maintainable [Binoy AS v. Suresh Gopi, Joshi Villadom v. Suresh Gopi] Gopi is the lone Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP) MP from Kerala in the Lok Sabha. Justice Kauser Edappagath rejected the objections raised by Gopi against the maintainability of the plea and held that the
